en: The Seven Wonders of the World, Christ the Redeemer, the Taj Mahal, the Great Pyramids, truly man's greatest achievements.
ko: 타지마할 대피라미드 진정 인류 최고의 업적들 하지만 이걸 다르게 보는 남자가 있어

en: But there's one man who sees them differently. If that was on my road, the council would be on it.
ko: 하지만 그들을 다르게 보는 남자가 한 명 있어. 만약 그게 내 도로에 있었다면, 시청에서 처리했을 거야.

en: They'd go, get that down. It's a death trap. Carl Pilkington.
ko: 그들은 가서, 그거 치워! 이건 죽음의 덫이야. 칼 필킹턴.

en: It's like a pylon. I don't know the politically correct term.
ko: 그건 전봇대 같아. 정치적으로 올바른 용어는 모르겠어.

en: Moron, I think. He is a round, empty-headed, chimp-like, mank, moron, buffoon, idiot.

en: Homer is small-minded, petty, but at his core, a good person. And lovable, absolutely lovable.
It's like a game of Jenga that's gone out of hand. I can't get enough of him. Is everyone going to be wearing this?
ko: 아무리 봐도 안 질려 다들 이거 입어야 해? 전형적인 소시민이고 안전지대를 벗어나기 아무리 봐도 안 질려 다들 이거 입어야 해? 전형적인 소시민이고 안전지대를 벗어나기

en: He's a typical little Ingrid, and he doesn't like going out of his comfort zone. Bollocks, a squash. I just think that it'd be amazing to send him round the world.
ko: 아무리 봐도 안 질려 다들 이거 입어야 해? 전형적인 소시민이고 안전지대를 벗어나기 싫어해 말도 안 돼 세계 일주를 보내면 대박일 것 같아 싫어해 말도 안 돼 세계 일주를 보내면 대박일 것 같아

en: What we'd like to see is him experience other cultures, other peoples, and see if in any way we can change his outlook on the world.
I've been to many exotic places. I genuinely think travel broadens the mind. I want him to hate it. I want him to hate every minute of it for my own amusement.
ko: 이국적인 곳을 많이 갔었어 여행은 시야를 넓힌다고 진심으로 생각해 쟤가 싫어했으면 좋겠어 내 즐거움을 위해 매 순간 싫어했으면 좋겠어

en: Nothing is funnier than Carl in a corner being poked by a stick. I am that stick.
ko: 막대기로 찔리는 칼만큼 웃긴 건 없어 내가 그 막대기야 이제

en: And now I have the might of Skye behind me.
This is one of the funniest, most expensive practical jokes I've ever done, and it's going to be great.
ko: 이건 내가 해본 가장 웃기고 비싼 장난이야 끝내줄 거야

en: Just let me go home! Jesus Christ!
